proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients without `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`.

analyses.code: Two-sample risk-difference z test comparing objective_response by treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine.
analyses.result_summary: Objective response was 21.96% with treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine vs 16.61% without it; risk difference 5.35 percentage points (p=3.69e-49).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for age, sex, ECOG performance status, secondary AML, fitness, adverse/genomic markers, WBC, albumin, CRP, and weight loss, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` is associated with higher `objective_response`.

analyses.code: HC1-robust linear probability model with clinical and genomic covariates.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine was 5.42 percentage points (p=3.42e-52).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `treatment_7plus3` have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients without `treatment_7plus3`.

analyses.code: Two-sample risk-difference z test comparing objective_response by treatment_7plus3.
analyses.result_summary: Objective response was 18.89% with treatment_7plus3 vs 18.63% without it; risk difference 0.26 percentage points (p=0.4580).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `unfit_for_intensive` set to 1 have a higher `objective_response` rate than patients with `unfit_for_intensive` set to 0.

analyses.code: Two-sample risk-difference z test comparing objective_response by unfit_for_intensive.
analyses.result_summary: Objective response was 22.10% in unfit patients vs 16.51% in fit patients; risk difference 5.59 percentage points (p=1.75e-53).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `npm1_mutation` have higher `objective_response` after clinical and genomic adjustment than patients without `npm1_mutation`.

analyses.code: HC1-robust adjusted linear probability model.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for npm1_mutation was 6.76 percentage points (p=3.46e-66).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `tp53_mutation` have lower `objective_response` after clinical and genomic adjustment than patients without `tp53_mutation`.

analyses.code: HC1-robust adjusted linear probability model.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for tp53_mutation was -2.53 percentage points (p=5.66e-6).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `complex_karyotype` have lower `objective_response` after clinical and genomic adjustment than patients without `complex_karyotype`.

analyses.code: HC1-robust adjusted linear probability model.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted coefficient for complex_karyotype was -2.34 percentage points (p=7.05e-7).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 5 percentage-point increase in `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with lower `objective_response`.

analyses.code: Univariate linear probability regression of objective_response on weight_loss_pct_6mo scaled per 5 percentage points.
analyses.result_summary: Per 5 percentage-point higher weight_loss_pct_6mo, objective_response changed by -2.61 percentage points (p=7.32e-31).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 1 g/dL increase in `albumin_g_dl` is associated with higher `objective_response`.

analyses.code: Univariate linear probability regression of objective_response on albumin_g_dl.
analyses.result_summary: Per 1 g/dL higher albumin_g_dl, objective_response changed by 1.79 percentage points (p=2.82e-7).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 10 mg/L increase in `crp_mg_l` is associated with lower `objective_response`.

analyses.code: Univariate linear probability regression of objective_response on crp_mg_l scaled per 10 mg/L.
analyses.result_summary: Per 10 mg/L higher crp_mg_l, objective_response changed by -0.86 percentage points (p=6.04e-6).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 10 percentage-point increase in `blast_pct_marrow` is associated with lower `objective_response`.

analyses.code: Univariate linear probability regression of objective_response on blast_pct_marrow scaled per 10 percentage points.
analyses.result_summary: Per 10 percentage-point higher blast_pct_marrow, objective_response changed by -0.75 percentage points (p=2.20e-16).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each 10 k/uL increase in `wbc_k_per_ul` is associated with lower `objective_response`.

analyses.code: Univariate linear probability regression of objective_response on wbc_k_per_ul scaled per 10 k/uL.
analyses.result_summary: Per 10 k/uL higher wbc_k_per_ul, objective_response changed by -0.25 percentage points (p=1.82e-4).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with both low `albumin_g_dl` (<25th percentile) and high `crp_mg_l` (>75th percentile) have lower `objective_response` than all other patients.

analyses.code: Risk-difference z test for the low-albumin/high-CRP subgroup.
analyses.result_summary: Using albumin < 3.50 g/dL and CRP > 7.04 mg/L, objective_response was 16.28% vs 18.91%; risk difference -2.63 percentage points (p=1.21e-4).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with both high `wbc_k_per_ul` (>75th percentile) and high `ldh_u_l` (>75th percentile) have lower `objective_response` than all other patients.

analyses.code: Risk-difference z test for the high-WBC/high-LDH subgroup.
analyses.result_summary: Using WBC > 24.10 k/uL and LDH > 266.73 U/L, objective_response was 17.09% vs 18.86%; risk difference -1.77 percentage points (p=0.0108).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `unfit_for_intensive` set to 1, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` is associated with higher `objective_response`.

analyses.code: Within-subgroup risk-difference z test among unfit_for_intensive=1 patients.
analyses.result_summary: Among unfit patients, objective_response was 30.81% with treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine vs 16.30% without it; risk difference 14.51 percentage points (p=9.22e-123).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `unfit_for_intensive` set to 0, `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` is associated with lower `objective_response` than no `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine`.

analyses.code: Within-subgroup risk-difference z test among unfit_for_intensive=0 patients.
analyses.result_summary: Among fit patients, objective_response was 16.05% with treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine vs 16.81% without it; risk difference -0.77 percentage points (p=0.0792).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` and `objective_response` is stronger when `unfit_for_intensive` is 1 than when it is 0.

analyses.code: HC1-robust adjusted linear probability interaction model with treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine * unfit_for_intensive.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient was 15.25 percentage points (p=4.70e-94).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive association between `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` and `objective_response` is weaker in patients with `tp53_mutation` than in patients without `tp53_mutation`.

analyses.code: HC1-robust adjusted linear probability interaction model with treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine * tp53_mutation.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient was -6.86 percentage points (p=1.37e-9).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_7plus3` and `objective_response` is lower in patients with `complex_karyotype` than in patients without `complex_karyotype`.

analyses.code: HC1-robust adjusted linear probability interaction model with treatment_7plus3 * complex_karyotype.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient was -3.17 percentage points (p=7.88e-4).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_midostaurin` and `objective_response` is higher in patients with `flt3_itd` than in patients without `flt3_itd`.

analyses.code: HC1-robust adjusted linear probability interaction model with treatment_midostaurin * flt3_itd.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient was -1.50 percentage points (p=0.2112).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_gilteritinib` and `objective_response` is higher in patients with `flt3_itd` than in patients without `flt3_itd`.

analyses.code: HC1-robust adjusted linear probability interaction model with treatment_gilteritinib * flt3_itd.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient was 1.17 percentage points (p=0.3329).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_ivosidenib` and `objective_response` is higher in patients with `idh1_mutation` than in patients without `idh1_mutation`.

analyses.code: HC1-robust adjusted linear probability interaction model with treatment_ivosidenib * idh1_mutation.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient was -4.66 percentage points (p=0.0414), opposite the hypothesized positive direction.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_enasidenib` and `objective_response` is higher in patients with `idh2_mutation` than in patients without `idh2_mutation`.

analyses.code: HC1-robust adjusted linear probability interaction model with treatment_enasidenib * idh2_mutation.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient was 0.49 percentage points (p=0.8254).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine` and `objective_response` decreases with each 10-year increase in `age_years`.

analyses.code: HC1-robust adjusted linear probability interaction model with treatment_venetoclax_azacitidine * age_years, age scaled per 10 years.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient was -0.15 percentage points per 10 years (p=0.6523).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The association between `treatment_7plus3` and `objective_response` decreases with each 10-year increase in `age_years`.

analyses.code: HC1-robust adjusted linear probability interaction model with treatment_7plus3 * age_years, age scaled per 10 years.
analyses.result_summary: Adjusted interaction coefficient was 0.13 percentage points per 10 years (p=0.6921), not in the hypothesized negative direction.
